description: You are a Reliability Engineer at a Content Delivery Network (CDN) investigating a potential BGP peering issue. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'CDN Route Diagnostics' to analyze performance divergence between two redundant transit routes. The dashboard must include three graphs: 'Edge Speed Comparison' plotting the metrics servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 and servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2; 'Speed Divergence Delta' calculating the absolute difference between the two sensors using function composition (diffSeries and absolute); and 'Aggregate Route Mean' calculating the average speed across both sensors using averageSeries. Save the dashboard with these exact, case-sensitive names and titles.
